element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns realistic momentum and fall damage early
Acts as health system; resource management
Defensive tool to block enemy fire in combat encounters
Progressive complexity; guides player through non-scrolling screens with altitude variation
Integrated into spatial puzzle design across levels
Unlocks access to previously unreachable areas; used in final sequences

typical_tension_triggers: Spatial puzzles with multiple altitude levels
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Oscillating between exploration/puzzle-solving phases and combat encounters; tension builds gradually through 7-level progression with late-game escalation via teleportation mechanic and final Morph hideout breach

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to jump mechanics, realistic fall damage, and basic combat with pistol and shield system
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increasing complexity of spatial puzzles requiring multi-level navigation; deathmatch tournament sequence introduces time pressure and sustained combat
difficulty_curve.late_game: Introduction of teleportation device unlocks new movement options; final hideout breach combines all mechanics; Morph infiltrators present escalated threat
notable_spikes: Death Tower gladiatorial deathmatch (acquiring tournament ticket)
Nightclub hideout infiltration and Morph encounters
Final teleportation sequences to Morph homeworld

notable_level_patterns.description: Each level spans many discrete screens without continuous scrolling; nearly all screens feature multiple altitude levels requiring vertical navigation, jumping between platforms at different heights, and environmental puzzle-solving
Enemy encounters (police, Morphs) are interspersed within spatial navigation challenges; player must use pistol, shield, and force field while managing platforming constraints
notable_level_patterns.example_level: New Washington police encounters, Nightclub hideout

notable_level_patterns.description: Elevation changes dominate level design; elevators, climbing, ledge-grabbing, and falling mechanics are core to navigation puzzle logic
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All levels, particularly Morph hideout under nightclub

notable_level_patterns.description: Teleportation device (late game) unlocks previously unreachable areas and gates final progression sequences
